eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Arizona; at 02:18 PM ON FEB 23, 2026 Effective until 10:18 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A SAFE Alert has been issued for Phoenix Police Department. This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety. The Phoenix Police Department is looking for a white female, Mary Macgregor, 71 years-old, 5 foot 6 inches, 150 pounds, with blonde hair and blue eyes. Mary was last seen wearing a navy-blue coat and black pants. She was last seen in the area of north 7th Street and east Deer Valley Road in Phoenix, Arizona, Maricopa County on 02/20/2026 at approximately 1130 hours. Mary was last seen driving a blue 2026 Toyota GR86, with an Arizona license plate 0 B A 0 Y 4. If you have contact with this SAFE Alert, please call 911. Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
